title: ForgeArenaTask
description: A single oversight task in the Forge + Arena task bank.

id.description: Unique task identifier (e.g. 'task-cs-001' or UUID4 for generated tasks).

domain.description: Task domain — determines which BaseDomain handles sampling.

description.description: Natural language task description shown to the Worker and Overseer.

context.description: Supporting context (documents, code snippets, constraints) for the task.

ground_truth_output.description: Reference output used by the correction grader (ROUGE-L / token overlap).

corruption_sophistication.description: Continuous float in [0.0, 1.0]. Controls how subtle the corruption is made.

obfuscation_depth.description: How deeply the corruption is buried in the Worker CoT.

difficulty_tier.description: Forge-assigned difficulty tier (null before first estimation).

is_generated.description: True for tasks generated by TaskGenerator; false for hand-authored seed tasks.

metadata.description: Arbitrary extra fields (author notes, generation params, etc.).
